title: GitHub - microsoft/copilot-intellij-feedback: Feedback on GitHub Copilot for JetBrains IDEs.
summary: This repository hosts the feedback channel for the GitHub Copilot Plugin for JetBrains IDEs, an AI-powered coding assistant that provides intelligent code completions and chat-based assistance within JetBrains development environments. The plugin leverages advanced language models to enhance the developer experience. This specific repository does not describe a new solution but serves as a public interface for users to report issues, request features, and submit feedback on the existing plugin's user experience and interface. It provides guidance on collecting logs for troubleshooting purposes.
author: Microsoft
